org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class ConstantStepTimeManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.TimeManager
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.AbstractTimeManager
        • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.ConstantStepTimeManager
  • Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class ConstantStepTimeManager
extends AbstractTimeManager
    Time Manager based on constant time steps.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Constructor Detail

      • ConstantStepTimeManager

        public ConstantStepTimeManager(long time_step,
                       TimeUnit time_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Parameters:
        time_step - is the constant time step used by this manager.
        time_unit - is the unit to express the constant time step.

    • Method Detail

      • preAgentScheduling

        protected void preAgentScheduling(long kernel_time,
                      long last_kernel_step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Called by the environment before the scheduling of the agents.
        Specified by:
        preAgentScheduling in class TimeManager
        Parameters:
        kernel_time - is the current kernel date.
        last_kernel_step_duration - is the duration of the last kernel step in milliseconds.

      • postAgentScheduling

        protected void postAgentScheduling(long kernel_time,
                       long last_kernel_step_duration)
        Deprecated. 
        Called by the environment before the scheduling of the agents.
        Specified by:
        postAgentScheduling in class TimeManager
        Parameters:
        kernel_time - is the current kernel date.
        last_kernel_step_duration - is the duration of the last kernel step in milliseconds.
